title: Post Office Visit
opening: Hello. How can I help you?

t1.prompt: Hello. How can I help you?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello. How can I help you? — Hello. How can I help you?

t2.prompt: Okay. Where do you send the parcel?
t2.promptTranslation: Okay. Where do you send the parcel? — Okay. Where do you send the parcel?

t3.prompt: Okay. How many stamps do you need?
t3.promptTranslation: Okay. How many stamps do you need? — Okay. How many stamps do you need?

t4.promptTranslation: What is your question? — What is your question?

t5.prompt: Okay. I can help you with that. Please wait here.
t5.promptTranslation: Okay. I can help you with that. Please wait here. — Okay. I can help you with that. Please wait here.

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry? Can you say that again, please?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry? Can you say that again, please? — Sorry? Can you say that again, please?

t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you. Goodbye. — Thank you. Goodbye.
